title: croton boivinianus
intro: Croton boivinianus, also known as Boivin's croton, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect the body from oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Croton boivinianus is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, which are made by steeping the leaves in hot water to release their active compounds.
